      "text": "8. Tad neimneet ta KUNga

"

    {
      "n": 9,

      "text": "9. Tad luhkojeet / ja tas us

irr aiskahrusi/ bet tas irr mums

"

    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un tee Laudis darrtja ta/
un nehme diwi sihdamasGohwis/
un eejuhdse tahs preekſch Rat-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un tee likfe ta KUNGA
Schkirstu us teem Ratteem/lihds
ar to Tranzinu är tahm selta
Pellehm / un ar to Pakkatas-
Wahschu Sihmehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Tad gahje tahs Gohwis
teecham pa to Zeltu uhs Bet-
Seemeſu/ weenâ paschâ Zeltâ
gahje tahs tikkufchi btaudanas /
un ne atkahye ne pa labbas nedś

steru Leeli-Kungi gahje tahm pak-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Untee no Bet-Seemeſe

un kad tee fawas Azzis pazehle
un to Schkirstu redſeja/ tad pre-
zajahs tee to redsedami.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Un tee Ratti nahze u

mu/ un pastahweja tur: Un tu-

toRattoMalku/un uppureja tah-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un tee Lewiti nozehle t
KUNGA Schkirstu lihds ar t-
Tranzinu/ kas klahtu bija/ fu-
tee Selta Rihki eekſcha bija/ u-

Laudis no Bet-Seemes uppure-
ja Dedsamus-Uppurus/ un pee-
neffe Zittus Uppurus tam KUN-
GAM tai paschâ Deena.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un kad tee peezi Wilister-

us Ekroun.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Schihg nu irr tahs Selta
Pakkatas-Wahtes/ fo tee Wilii-
steri taim KUNGAM par weeni-
Noseedsibas Uppuri dewe/ weeni-
preekſch Asdoda/ weenu preekſ-
Gasas/ weenu preekſch Askloka-
weenu preekſch Gadas / weeni-
preekſch Ekrona.
"

      "n": 18,

      "text": "18. Un tahs Selta Pelles bi-

ro Pilsfahtu / ka ir to Meesto-
lihds
